facts.title: v0.7.0 production milestone (architecture complete)
facts.body: 0.7.0 marks the architectural-completion line under the manifest's 'minor-on-architecture-change' versioning policy. PHASE-12 follow-up (the native HTTP.sys substrate with end-to-end stdio bridge to supervised pool children, shipped in v0.6.10) was the last architectural change. Every numbered phase from PHASE-00 (repository baseline + ADR lock) through PHASE-12 follow-up is delivered, validated, and shipping. Both gateway substrates ship and are operator-selectable: NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter binds HTTP.sys directly with full MCP initialize / tools/list / tools/call handling via the v0.6.10 stdio bridge. URL ACL self-registration runs in the bootstrapper install action so console-mode operators can bind without elevation. PHASE-13 (Win2D / Direct2D high-frequency visual surfaces in the WinUI shell -- per-instance telemetry charts at 60Hz, procedural Tron HLSL backdrop, SwapChainPanel activity stream, animated saturation rings) is explicitly visual-polish work, not architectural, and is scheduled to land incrementally across v0.7.x point releases per the plan file. End-to-end smoke test on this host: MSI installs cleanly (REINSTALL=ALL REINSTALLMODE=amus to force binary update), service starts, native gateway binds and responds to MCP initialize with serverInfo.name='MCOS Native Gateway' and serverInfo.version='0.7.0', URL ACL http://+:8080/ user=Everyone confirmed registered, all 4 CTest suites pass green.

facts.title: v0.6.10 released (PHASE-12 follow-up complete)
facts.body: Native HTTP.sys gateway can now actually forward tools/call to supervised pool children. (1) IWorkerSupervisor::sendStdioJsonRpc(instanceId, request, timeoutMs) -- per-instance mutex serializes concurrent requests; deadline-based PeekNamedPipe poll loop reads stdout, parses newline-delimited JSON lines, matches by id. (2) ChildProcess in WorkerSupervisor gains childStdoutRead, childStdinWrite, unique_ptr<mutex> stdioMutex, stdioReadBuffer, nextRequestId; startInstanceLocked creates CreatePipe pairs with SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES, sets STARTF_USESTDHANDLES + hStdInput/hStdOutput/hStdError, calls CreateProcessW with bInheritHandles=TRUE, then closes child-side ends in parent. terminateInstancesLocked closes the pipes before destroying the Job Object. (3) NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter gains AttachWorkerBridge(supervisor, leaseRouter) for late-binding; refreshToolCatalogLocked walks every pool's first Ready instance via the bridge and aggregates tools/list with serverName=poolId attribution; tools/call resolves params.name (qualified or unique unprefixed), acquires a lease, forwards via bridge with id rewriting + name unprefixing, re-stamps response id. (4) Bootstrapper install action runs netsh http add urlacl for the gateway port so console-mode operators can bind without ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED; uninstall reverses it best-effort. (5) HTTP.sys body extraction enhanced with HttpReceiveRequestEntityBody fallback so non-COPY_BODY-friendly clients (PowerShell Invoke-RestMethod, Expect:100-continue, chunked) work. (6) Fixed nlohmann::json{nullptr} -> nlohmann::json(nullptr) bug that produced [null] arrays instead of null scalars in JSON-RPC error envelopes. End-to-end smoke test on the host: MSI installs cleanly, service starts, gateway switches native HTTP.sys gateway->native, /api/gateway/start binds HTTP.sys, MCP initialize returns serverInfo.version=0.6.10, tools/list returns honest empty array (no pools registered), URL ACL http://+:8080/ user=Everyone confirmed via netsh.

facts.title: Bootstrapper INFINITE-wait rewrite
facts.body: src/MasterControlBootstrapper/main.cpp:644 (runProcess) and :707 (runProcessCapture) use WaitForSingleObject(..., INFINITE). The right fix is the concurrent-drain pattern at MasterControlRuntime.cpp:1059. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT 6.4 documents the exemption.

facts.title: Auto-fail-leases-on-failed-instance sweeper
facts.body: Periodic timer that walks IWorkerSupervisor::listPools() + ILeaseRouter::activeLeases() and transitions leases bound to Failed instances to LeaseState::Failed. Pairs with heartbeat-decay-to-Stale presence transitions.

facts.title: PDH/DXGI host telemetry enrichment
facts.body: ITelemetryAggregator surface is ready; the actual PDH-driven CPU/disk/network counters and DXGI GPU memory readings are not yet wired. Additive change behind an IHostTelemetryProbe.

facts.title: Browser-side test harness (formatMetric unit + Playwright)
facts.body: No JS test harness in the repo. PHASE-10 release gate concern. formatMetric is the highest-value unit.

facts.title: WinUI shell realignment
facts.body: src/MasterControlShell/ builds clean (1 pre-existing C4100) but is not wired to any gateway-first panel. Decide whether to delete or rebuild around the new model.

facts.title: Install-use-uninstall round-trip on clean VM
facts.body: Gold-standard installer smoke. Needs Windows Sandbox / fresh-VM runner with admin privileges.

facts.body: Real gateway binary integration test. Operator-installed per ADR-002 Â§11; supervised-mock fallback handles its absence honestly.

facts.body: Pools panel exposes scale-to-min and drain inline; full create/edit/remove via UI lands when explicitly scoped.

facts.title: ADR-002 Â§1 â€” no provider-era execution
facts.body: MCOS does not execute ChatGPT/Codex/Claude/Grok directly. Provider names persist only as client profile types.
tags: seed:invariant:ADR-002 Â§1 â€” no provider-era execution

facts.title: ADR-002 Â§1 â€” LAN AI-client surface is auth=none / trust=lan
facts.body: Trust enforced at the network/firewall layer, not the application layer. Operator surface is logically separate.
tags: seed:invariant:ADR-002 Â§1 â€” LAN AI-client surface is au

facts.title: ADR-002 Â§3 â€” gateway-first topology
facts.body: AI client -> MCOS advertised MCP Gateway -> native HTTP.sys gateway -> MCOS logical pool -> LeaseRouter -> backend instance. Autoscaled clones NOT exposed as separate public tools.

facts.title: ADR-002 Â§8 â€” sticky-session integrity (no hot-migration)
facts.body: LeaseRouter step 1 returns active lease verbatim, never re-binding to a different instance. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT Â§2.4 enforces.

facts.title: ADR-002 Â§9 â€” honest telemetry (-1.0 = unavailable)
facts.body: ClientHeartbeat / WorkerTelemetry use -1.0 as the unavailable sentinel. 0.0 is genuine 'idle'. HostTelemetrySnapshot is exempt (PDH-direct). FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT Â§4.3 + Â§8.1 enforce.
tags: seed:invariant:ADR-002 Â§9 â€” honest telemetry (-1.0 = un

facts.title: ADR-002 Â§10 â€” release gate, no workflow_dispatch bypass
facts.body: windows-build-test-package.yml + release.yml are the gating pair. Neither has workflow_dispatch. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT Â§6.2 enforces.
tags: seed:invariant:ADR-002 Â§10 â€” release gate, no workflow_

facts.title: ADR-002 Â§11 â€” Forsetti vendoring is sealed
facts.body: No edits inside Forsetti-Framework-Windows-main/. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT Â§5.1 + the Forsetti compliance script enforce.
tags: seed:invariant:ADR-002 Â§11 â€” Forsetti vendoring is seal

facts.title: Group 1 â€” Provider-era execution forbidden
facts.body: ADR-001 Â§1 + ADR-002 Â§1. Sections 1.1-1.7 in FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT-GREP-LIST.md. Includes provider modules, services, transports, routes, data types, governance kinds.

facts.title: Group 2 â€” Gateway abstraction integrity
facts.body: ADR-002 Â§2,Â§3. No direct native HTTP.sys gateway coupling outside the adapter; no autoscaled-clone registration as separate tools; no hot-migration; sticky-session integrity (Â§2.4); worker process tree containment (Â§2.1a).

facts.title: Group 3 â€” Trust model integrity
facts.body: ADR-002 Â§1. No app-layer auth on AI-client gateway; no bearer/session token requirements; operator-surface auth must not regress to 'anyone can mutate'.

facts.title: Group 4 â€” Telemetry honesty
facts.body: ADR-002 Â§9. No fake telemetry (Â§4.1); per-client metrics only via heartbeat/sidecar (Â§4.2); ClientHeartbeat -1.0 sentinel integrity (Â§4.3); event ring cap stays at 1024 (Â§4.4); recordHeartbeat is the only client-metric write site (Â§4.5).

facts.title: Group 5 â€” Forsetti vendoring sealed
facts.body: ADR-002 Â§11. git diff Forsetti-Framework-Windows-main/ since baseline must be empty.

facts.title: Group 6 â€” CI / release gate integrity
facts.body: ADR-002 Â§10. No hardcoded VS Enterprise path (Â§6.1); no workflow_dispatch on gating workflows (Â§6.2); no path-segment Enterprise in workflows (Â§6.3); process execution 7-step compliance with documented bootstrapper exemptions (Â§6.4); version-stamp before configure (Â§6.5).
tags: seed:contract:Group 6 â€” CI / release gate in

facts.title: Group 7 â€” Phase scope integrity
facts.body: manifest.json. PHASE-00 must not edit code (Â§7.1); PHASE-XX must not edit files outside its scope (Â§7.2 â€” manual review).

facts.title: Group 8 â€” Dashboard honesty
facts.body: ADR-002 Â§9, PHASE-09. Dashboard must render -1.0 as 'unavailable' (Â§8.1); no legacy hardcoded surface IDs (Â§8.2); no provider-era residue in app.js (Â§8.3); no removed-route fetches (Â§8.4).

facts.title: ADR-003: keep native HTTP.sys gateway for v0.6.x
facts.body: PHASE-11 decision: keep native HTTP.sys gateway as the v0.6.x default gateway substrate behind the existing IMcpGateway adapter. Native HTTP.sys gateway is documented as a conditional future phase (proposed PHASE-12). The adapter abstraction makes the choice reversible. Source-tree unchanged.

facts.title: PHASE-12 native HTTP.sys gateway (conditional)
facts.body: Native gateway implementation deferred per ADR-003. Activates only when one of five triggers is observed: (1) measured throughput cap with operational impact, (2) confirmed session-affinity break under load, (3) native HTTP.sys gateway release-cadence stall, (4) operator-experience friction blocking adoption, (5) vendoring policy change. Migration plan documented in docs/implementation/PHASE-11-NATIVE-GATEWAY-EVALUATION.md Ã‚Â§3. Effort estimate 7-18 weeks. Requirements documented in Ã‚Â§2. Native must implement IMcpGateway exactly; NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter stays as in-tree fallback even post-migration.

facts.title: ADR-003 Ã‚Â§triggers: PHASE-12 activation conditions
facts.body: PHASE-12 (native HTTP.sys gateway) activates if and only if one or more of: (1) native HTTP.sys gateway saturates below required p95 under real LAN AI-client load, (2) PHASE-07 sticky-session contract observably violated by native HTTP.sys gateway routing, (3) native HTTP.sys gateway does not track an MCP spec version we need to ship, (4) operators consistently fail to install native HTTP.sys gateway alongside MCOS, (5) ADR-002 Ã‚Â§11 vendoring policy changes. PHASE-08 telemetry surface is the right monitoring tool for triggers 1 and 2; 3 and 4 are organizational signals. Recall this fact at the start of any future operations review.

facts.title: PHASE-11 complete: realignment program done (PHASE-00..PHASE-11)
facts.body: PHASE-11 was the last phase in the realignment manifest. All 12 phases (PHASE-00..PHASE-11) are complete. Subsequent work is conditional (PHASE-12 if triggers fire), deferred maintenance (consolidated under tags=[deferred]), or out-of-scope operations/feature work. Product is releasable per the PHASE-10 gate.

facts.title: v0.6.6 shipped (uninstaller Error 1309 + activity ring + telemetry IP)
facts.body: Commit 13b553c. Fixes MsiInstaller Error 1309 on every upgrade (Start Menu .lnk locked by Explorer/Search Indexer): added <RemoveFile On=install> for both shortcuts so the stale .lnk is deleted before MSI tries to checksum it, plus util:CloseApplication entries for MasterControlShell.exe and MasterControlOrchestrationServer.exe via Restart Manager. Activity ring drops admin_api_request entries with empty method+path (port-scanner/keep-alive probes were polluting the Live Command Stream). Host telemetry primaryIpAddress now honors activeProfile.preferredBindAddress (v0.6.4 fixed advertise side; v0.6.6 fixed dashboard side).

facts.title: v0.6.7 shipped (Option D: gateway port honest 503 listener)
facts.body: Commit 226670d. NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter binds mcpGateway.listenHost:listenPort with a tiny accept loop returning structured 503 JSON whenever the adapter is in Disabled or supervised-mock mode. LAN AI clients pointing at http://<host>:8080/mcp now get a useful structured error with operator guidance instead of TCP RST. Listener stops cleanly before native HTTP.sys gateway takes the port; restarts on Stop(). Winsock include-order fix: WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN + winsock2.h before windows.h in both the header and the cpp.

facts.title: Open work for next session (post v0.6.7)
facts.body:
Operator priorities (in order):
1. Pool persistence: AppConfiguration has no pools field. Pools live in WorkerSupervisor::pools_ memory only and are wiped every restart/upgrade. Need: add pools to MasterControlModels.h AppConfiguration + NLOHMANN macro, write-on-upsertPool/removePool, read-on-startup-and-call-upsertPool. The on-disk config file is at C:\ProgramData\MasterControlOrchestrationServer\config\master-control-orchestration-server.json (NOT the wiki-documented mcos.json path with spaces).
2. PHASE-12 plan file (full native HTTP.sys MCP gateway in C++) - replaces the v0.6.7 honest-503 listener. Operator priority: get away from native HTTP.sys gateway dependency entirely. Estimated 7-18 weeks for full impl, 1-2 weeks for minimal subset (Streamable-HTTP + path routing + lease router integration).
3. PHASE-13 plan file (Win2D / Direct2D rendering in WinUI shell) - operator authorized GPU rendering for entire project. WinUI 3 already runs on DX11 via Composition; PHASE-13 is about explicit Direct2D drawing for high-rate live visuals (60Hz per-instance telemetry charts, Tron grid backdrop as procedural shader, activity stream as flowing visual log).
4. Per-instance graphic telemetry charts in BROWSER dashboard (Canvas, GPU-composited automatically) - sparklines for cpuPercent/memoryMbytes per pool instance.
5. Telemetry events ring at /api/telemetry/events returns count=0. No producer wired (only activity ring is populated). Wire supervisor lifecycle + lease router events.
6. Configuration window in WinUI shell not showing actual config - need to compare what shell renders vs what /api/config returns.
7. v0.6.5 shell Apply Host Settings was DISABLED bug fixed in v0.6.5. v0.6.6+ should respect it correctly.

Key context for next session:
- Live MCOS install at C:\Program Files\Master Control Orchestration Server\, runs as service "MasterControlProgram" under LocalSystem (DisplayName: Master Control Orchestration Server).
- Operator port http://localhost:7300/ - operator dashboard + admin API. mcp gateway port 8080 now has the honest-503 listener.
- preferredBindAddress = 192.168.1.7 (set via API earlier; persisted across upgrade).
- 7 pools were registered earlier (mcp-filesystem, mcp-memory, mcp-everything, mcp-sequential-thinking, subagent-coordinator, subagent-memorian, subagent-thinker) - LOST on each upgrade until pool persistence fix lands.
- Firewall rules: 4 MCOS rules created via UAC-elevated PowerShell (TCP 7300, TCP 8080, UDP 7301, UDP 5353). Persist across upgrades.
- mcos-control plugin junction at %USERPROFILE%\.claude\plugins\mcos-control points at install dir share/claude-plugins/mcos-control. 43 tools confirmed working via stdio JSON-RPC test.
- AI contributor guard active: NEVER use Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer in commits or any AI attribution.
- Sync-RepositoryVersionBadges.ps1 keeps README badges + vcpkg.json version-string + the 3 .rc VERSIONINFO blocks in lock-step with VERSION.json. Run after every version bump.

facts.title: v0.6.8 shipped (pool persistence + Canvas charts + telemetry ring + PHASE-12/13 plans)
facts.body: Commit 06a09e2. The biggest operator-pain item is gone: pool definitions now persist across restart and MSI upgrade via AppConfiguration.pools. Runtime hydrates pools at boot, POST /api/pools and remove call persistSupervisedPoolsToConfiguration to write back. Browser dashboard gains per-instance Canvas sparklines (CPU% + RAM MB time-series, 60-sample ring at 2s cadence). Telemetry events ring producer wired (pool/lease lifecycle events). /api/telemetry/events now returns {events, maxEvents} envelope and honors ?max=N. Shell config narrative surfaces preferredBindAddress. PHASE-12 plan file (full native HTTP.sys gateway, replaces honest-503 listener with real impl) and PHASE-13 plan file (Win2D rendering for high-rate visuals in shell) shipped. Implementation deferred to next releases.

facts.title: v0.6.9 shipped (PHASE-12 MVP -- native HTTP.sys gateway)
facts.body: Commit b585cc7. NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter implements IMcpGateway via Win32 HTTP.sys. mcpGateway.type=native selects it;  Adapter handles initialize + tools/list + /health end-to-end; tools/call returns -32601 pointing at v0.6.10 stdio bridge follow-up. Build links httpapi.lib. ADR-003 trigger #4 (operator-experience friction) addressed for the discovery surface. Stdio bridge for actual tool-call forwarding is the v0.6.10 follow-up.

facts.title: Open work for next session (post v0.6.9)
facts.body:
Roadmap state after v0.6.9:

DONE:
- v0.6.6: uninstaller Error 1309 fix, activity ring polish, telemetry IP override
- v0.6.7: honest 503 listener on gateway port (Option D)
- v0.6.8: pool persistence, per-instance Canvas charts, telemetry events ring producer, /api/telemetry/events envelope fix, shell config narrative surfaces preferredBindAddress
- v0.6.9: PHASE-12 MVP - NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter on HTTP.sys, adapter selection via mcpGateway.type

NEXT (v0.6.10 -- PHASE-12 follow-up):
1. Stdio bridge for native gateway. Modify WorkerSupervisor.startInstanceLocked to redirect child stdin/stdout pipes; add WorkerSupervisor::getInstanceStdio(instanceId) accessor; in NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter::handleMcpRequest tools/call branch, look up the lease-router-selected instance, send JSON-RPC to its stdin pipe, read response from stdout pipe. ~400-600 lines of C++.
2. Bootstrapper URL ACL registration: add `netsh http add urlacl url=http://+:8080/ user=Everyone` to MasterControlBootstrapper install action so console-mode users don't need elevation.
3. Once stdio bridge works, NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter::ListTools and tools/list return real aggregated tools from each pool child (speak tools/list to each on registration).

NEXT (v0.7.0 -- PHASE-13):
4. Win2D / Direct2D rendering in WinUI shell. Plan file at handoff/realignment/PHASE-13-direct2d-shell-rendering.md. Per-instance telemetry charts at 60Hz, Tron grid backdrop as procedural HLSL, activity stream as scrolling SwapChainPanel, saturation rings with smooth interpolation. ~2 weeks.

Key context:
- Live MCOS install at C:\Program Files\Master Control Orchestration Server\
- Service: MasterControlProgram (LocalSystem)
- Operator port http://localhost:7300/ - dashboard + admin API
- Gateway port 8080 - now handles two adapters: NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter (HTTP.sys-based)
- Pool persistence works as of v0.6.8: pools survive restart + upgrade
- Per-instance CPU/RAM telemetry sparklines on the dashboard's Pools deck (browser-side)
- 7 reference pools the operator originally registered (mcp-filesystem, mcp-memory, mcp-everything, mcp-sequential-thinking, subagent-coordinator, subagent-memorian, subagent-thinker) -- need to be POSTed once after install of v0.6.8+ to land in persisted config; then they survive every upgrade.
- AI contributor guard: NEVER use Co-Authored-By or any AI attribution in commits.
- Sync-RepositoryVersionBadges.ps1 keeps README badges + vcpkg.json + the 3 .rc VERSIONINFO blocks in lock-step with VERSION.json. Run after every version bump.
- mcos-memory MCP server at .claude/mcp-servers/mcos-memory/server.py with state at .claude/mcp-state/mcos-memory.json -- 45+ facts, search via recall tool.

PHASE-00.notes: Repository baseline + ADR-002 + drift inventory + removal map + grep list. Docs only.

PHASE-01.notes: Provider-era removal already mostly done (ADR-001); only WinUI shell had residual references. ~1100 lines net deletion.

PHASE-02.notes: IMcpGateway + NativeHttpSysGatewayAdapter + supervised-mock fallback. Gateway HTTP routes.

PHASE-03.notes: DNS-SD service registration + /.well-known/mcos.json + /api/discovery + UDP beacon + AppConfiguration.instanceId.

PHASE-05.notes: GovernanceBundleService + bundle distribution routes + bcrypt link + Forsetti compliance script update (6 stale assertions retired).

PHASE-06.notes: WorkerSupervisor + Job Object containment + 7-state lifecycle + pool admin routes. (std::max) parenthesization needed for Windows.h max() macro.

PHASE-07.notes: ILeaseRouter + sticky-session for stateful + least-loaded for stateless + same-type scale-out. (std::numeric_limits<int>::max)() parenthesization.

PHASE-08.notes: ITelemetryAggregator + ClientHeartbeat with -1.0 unavailable sentinel + 1024-event ring + 4 telemetry routes. (std::min) parenthesization for Windows.h min() macro.

PHASE-09.notes: Tron dashboard realigned to gateway-first. 11 destinations. formatMetric() honesty helper. DASHBOARD-ROUTE-MAP.md created.

PHASE-10.notes: Windows release gate closed. release.yml verifies same-SHA windows-build-test-package run before publishing. VERSION.json bumped 0.5.0 -> 0.6.0.

PHASE-11.notes: Decision: keep native HTTP.sys gateway for v0.6.x. Native HTTP.sys gateway deferred to conditional PHASE-12 gated on five triggers (throughput cap, session-affinity break, upstream stall, operator-install friction, vendoring policy change). ADR-003 records the decision. PHASE-11-NATIVE-GATEWAY-EVALUATION.md carries the matrix + requirements + migration plan + limitations.

src/MasterControlApp/MasterControlRuntim.note: Windows.h max()/min() macro collisions. Use parenthesization: (std::max)(...), (std::min)(...), (std::numeric_limits<int>::max)(). PHASE-06/07/08 all hit this.

Lines 914-1110: runHostedExecutable is the canonical 7-step process-execution reference. Concurrent drain threads under RAII scope guards, WaitForSingleObject with 5min timeout, TerminateJobObject on timeout, join, GetExitCodeProcess, cleanup. Reference for any new sync process invocation.

src/MasterControlBootstrapper/main.cpp.note: Lines 644 and 707: WaitForSingleObject(..., INFINITE) without timeout/kill/drain. Pre-existing, tagged with `// PHASE-10 known-issue` source comments. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT Â§6.4 documents the exemption. Rewrite is deferred work.

tests/MasterControlOrchestrationServerTe.note: Tests must be wired into main() near the bottom of the file. Each phase appended its tests to the ok &= chain, grouped by phase comment. 56 test functions as of PHASE-10.

include/MasterControl/MasterControlModel.note: ManagedEndpointPool's `template_` C++ field maps to `template` JSON key via explicit to_json/from_json. ClientHeartbeat metric fields default to -1.0 (unavailable sentinel). HostTelemetrySnapshot uses 0.0 (genuine idle, PDH-direct).

.github/workflows/windows-build-test-pac.note: DO NOT add workflow_dispatch. The gate is push/pull_request only. Concurrency cancels racing same-SHA runs. Version-stamp step must precede configure (FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT Â§6.5 enforces ordering).

.github/workflows/release.yml.note: DO NOT add workflow_dispatch. Tag-only trigger. Verifies same-SHA windows-build-test-package run via gh api before publishing. The file name is load-bearing â€” the release workflow's API query depends on it.

scripts/check-mastercontrol-forsetti.ps1.note: PHASE-05 retired 6 stale assertions about resources/web/app.js's pre-ADR-001 Forsetti bootstrap. Current rules: surface*Host elements present in index.html, no telemetryGrid/endpointTable IDs, no provider-era surfaces, no hardcoded CLU bootstrap.

VERSION.json.note: Single source of truth for product version. Bump only in PHASE-10 (already done: 0.5.0 -> 0.6.0). Sync-RepositoryVersionBadges.ps1 propagates to vcpkg.json + README badges.

resources/web/app.js.note: Honesty rule: every render of ClientHeartbeat / WorkerTelemetry metrics must go through formatMetric(). Direct .toFixed(...)+'%' is allowed only on HostTelemetrySnapshot (PDH-direct). FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT Â§8.1 enforces.

docs/wiki/Architecture-Decisions/ADR-003.note: Formal decision: keep native HTTP.sys gateway for v0.6.x. Five triggers in this ADR activate a future PHASE-12 (native HTTP.sys gateway). Cite this ADR before any gateway-substrate discussion.
